description: Multi-slide carousel posts showcasing product variations, preparation steps, or flavor combinations with integrated hashtags and brand mentions across slides.
structural_recipe: Create 3-5 slide carousel featuring: Slide 1 - Product hero shot with main caption asking question or teasing flavor; Slides 2-3 - Close-ups of variations, ingredients, or preparation; Final slide - Call-to-action with branded hashtags. Use Arabic captions paired with brand hashtags like #[brand_name] and community engagement hashtags. Include regional flavor references (matcha + strawberry in Saudi context). Text should be conversational and inquiry-based.
why_it_works: Carousels increase time-on-post and swipe engagement in Saudi market. Questioning format ('Have you tried...?') creates psychological engagement loop. Multiple slides allow storytelling that matches Saudi consumer preference for product education. Branded hashtags create community identity and repeat visibility, driving algorithmic favorability.
transplantation_caveats: Flavor combinations must align with local taste preferences and cultural sensitivities
Hashtag strategy should include regional markers and brand-specific tags for local discovery
Arabic copy quality is critical - colloquial, conversational tone performs better than formal Arabic
Product imagery must show portion sizes relatable to Saudi consumption norms
cultural_constraints: Avoid imagery conflicting with Islamic dietary guidelines
Flavor pairing should reference recognizable local or globally-acceptable combinations
Community hashtags should be tested for local relevance before deployment
